texto: Exceptional men do not hold their experiences to be out of the ordinary or of interest to anyone else. Unlike the trodden fungus-men, they are not so ignorantly and presumptuously self-absorbed. They are nobody and they know it. They shun notice. They are exceedingly rare.
explicacao: Citação de Nick Tosches sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “Exceptional men do not hold their experiences to be out of the ordinary or of interest to anyone …” articula autoestima, exceptionalism, humility em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como humility e men.

frase_original: Exceptional men do not hold their experiences to be out of the ordinary or of interest to anyone else. Unlike the trodden fungus-men, they are not so ignorantly and presumptuously self-absorbed. They are nobody and they know it. They shun notice. They are exceedingly rare.
